subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Face! In thy letter mention was made of His eminence the Secretary [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه در نامه آنجناب ذکری از جناب منشی کبیر بوده
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for justice and fairmindedness
